title: Marketing Operations Analyst
required_skills: Marketing analytics & advertising platform familiarity (Google Analytics, LinkedIn, Instagram, Looker)
Strong analytical mindset — interpret data and generate actionable insights
Organizational and time-management skills — managing multiple priorities
Communication and teamwork skills in distributed/remote cross-functional teams
Data accuracy, integrity, and consistency across marketing systems and reporting tools
Exposure to marketing, advertising, or communications (academic, internship, or project experience)
Bachelor's degree in Marketing, Business, Communications, or related field
bonus_skills: Interest in fintech and cryptocurrency marketing
Familiarity with marketing automation or tracking tools
matched_skills: Campaign performance optimisation (maps to: monitor campaign performance and prepare reports)
Data quality, tracking & QA (maps to: maintain data accuracy and integrity across marketing systems)
Cross-functional team coordination (maps to: coordinate across marketing and cross-functional remote teams)
Project management — Scrum, SAFe (maps to: plan, track, and manage marketing projects and campaigns)
E-commerce & campaign ROI analytics (maps to: marketing analytics and advertising platform familiarity)
Analytical mindset — funnel analysis, cohort analysis, A/B testing (maps to: strong analytical mindset)
Marketing KPI framework design (maps to: prepare reports with actionable insights)
Executive analytical reports (maps to: decision-making support via actionable insights)
missing_skills: Explicit hands-on experience with Google Analytics, Looker, or LinkedIn Ads platforms (not named in CV)
Marketing automation tool experience (e.g., HubSpot, Marketo, ActiveCampaign)
core_responsibilities: Plan, track, and manage marketing projects and campaigns to ensure timely execution aligned with business priorities
Coordinate resources, tasks, and priorities across marketing and cross-functional teams in a fully remote environment
Monitor campaign performance and prepare reports with actionable insights to support decision-making
Maintain data accuracy, integrity, and consistency across marketing systems and reporting tools
Support development of project documentation, timelines, workflows, and operational processes
recommended_emphasis: Highlight cross-functional project coordination in remote/distributed settings — directly mirrors the role's core operational context
Lead with campaign performance monitoring and reporting experience (Hapag-Lloyd CX data, HSBC budget dashboards) — maps to the analytics and reporting accountabilities
Emphasize data quality and tracking QA work at Hapag-Lloyd — exact match for 'maintain data accuracy across marketing systems'
Surface any familiarity with analytics platforms (Google Analytics, Looker, or similar BI tools) even if incidental
Mention fintech exposure via HSBC PMO role to partially address the fintech domain preference
Frame project management (Scrum/SAFe) as operational rigor supporting marketing workflow coordination

company_info.size_raw: No company size signal found in JD text; hiring company is an undisclosed Jobgether partner
